title: Ladies Caring & Sharing
description: A morning of prayer, encouragement, and fellowship for the ladies of the church. Light breakfast provided — please bring a friend.

title: Men's Discipleship Breakfast
description: Breakfast, Bible study, and Christ-centered fellowship for the men of Still Water. All visitors welcome.

title: Providence Rescue Mission
description: Serving a home-cooked meal and sharing the life-changing Gospel with neighbors in Providence.

title: Vacation Bible School
description: A week of music, lessons, crafts, and the Gospel of Jesus Christ for kids ages 4 through 12. Free and open to the community.

title: Pastor's Anniversary Sunday
description: Join us as we give thanks to the Lord for another year of pastoral ministry under Pastor Bob Levesque. Special music and a Fellowship Feast to follow.
